それでは！
何事も習うより慣れろ！
ってことで、がんばってくださーい。

せっかくなので、各ステージに
私の方からステージオーダーという
実験課題を出させてもらってますよー。

難易度はちょーっと高めですが
達成できれば、エネミーが弱くなったり
クリア後の報酬が増えたりしますよー！

それだけじゃなく！
ドロップアイテム数や、持ち帰りの
アイテム数もばばーんと増加です！

はーいそれじゃあ
よろしくお願いしますねー。
私は、カリンと言います。

エクストリームクエストの管理を
任されちゃってるんですー。
長い付き合いになれるといいですねー。

このクエストは
とりあえず５ステージクリアできれば、
クエストクリアになってますよー。

一見さんお断りの容赦ない難易度ですが
達成できれば、再現データが変化して
エネミーが弱くなったりしますよー！

課題を達成したら、次のステージでは
もっと手応えある難易度になりますけど
その分、報酬もすごく増えますよー
Virtual Items in Extreme Quests
Virtual Items in Extreme Quests

The enemies in Extreme Quests are artificial
reproductions.

Due to this, some of the items dropped are
in an unstable condition because they were
difficult to replicate.

These items bear a special icon when they appear.

These dropped items bearing this special icon do
not go into your inventory when they are picked up.
Instead, they are considered unstable data
and saved in their own space as Virtual Items.

The Virtual Items saved in their own
space cease to exist when the quest is
over; it is only when the quest is cleared
that a certain number of them can be
taken back using the Extreme Terminal.

In Extreme Quests, experimental requests called
"Stage Orders" are issued for each Stage.

Completing these requests increases
the number of items enemies drop.

Completing a certain number of Stage Orders
increases the number of items you can take back
with you when you clear the quests.

Some Stage Orders require the players to
satisfy their conditions without healing at all.

However, exceptions to this rule
are recovery effects through mags, automatic
recovery effects through skills, and recovery
effects through paid items.

In Extreme Quests, enemies are artificially
enhanced to create harsh conditions. These
enhancements are called "Enemy Capability Refactoring".

Completing the Stage Orders from previous Stages can reverse
Capability Refactoring that enhances some of enemies'
resistances and tip the scales in your favor.

Right, then! Practice makes perfect!
Do your best out there!

Since they're beneficial for you,
I'll be issuing experimental
Stage Orders for each stage!

The difficulty is a liiittle bit high, but if you
complete them, they'll weaken the enemies
and increase your rewards at the end!

But wait, there's more! You'll also get more
item drops, and you can take back sooo many
more items!

All righty, then! I look forward to helping you
with these. My name's Karin, by the way!

I was given the task of handling
the Extreme Quests. I hope to
work with you for a long time!

Anyway, if you can clear five stages,
then you'll complete the quest.

One look at this difficulty and you're thinking
"No way!" But the reproduction data will
change and make the enemies weaker!

If you complete the challenge, the difficulty
will be increased in the next stage, but
you'll also get a lot more rewards!
